1:
On the streets of Canal Town, you come across a young guide in a rather exciteable state. Eager to share his tale, he explains how his last tour came to an abrupt end when his customers vanished from existence. Seemingly unwilling to leave the job unfinished, he invites you to take the tour instead, and bids you rendezvous with him by the Font of Devotion.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.
